code: import{useEffect,useRef,useState}from'react';import{jsx as _jsx,Fragment as _Fragment,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";export default function Cursor(){const dotRef=useRef(null);const ringRef=useRef(null);const[hov,setHov]=useState(false);const pos=useRef({mx:0,my:0,rx:0,ry:0});useEffect(()=>{const move=e=>{pos.current.mx=e.clientX;pos.current.my=e.clientY;if(dotRef.current){dotRef.current.style.left=e.clientX+'px';dotRef.current.style.top=e.clientY+'px';}};document.addEventListener('mousemove',move);let raf;const loop=()=>{const p=pos.current;p.rx+=(p.mx-p.rx)*0.12;p.ry+=(p.my-p.ry)*0.12;if(ringRef.current){ringRef.current.style.left=p.rx+'px';ringRef.current.style.top=p.ry+'px';}raf=requestAnimationFrame(loop);};loop();const selectors='a, button, .vcard, .featured, .tcard, .dcard, .help-card, .fpill, .phone-frame, .phone-cover';const on=()=>setHov(true);const off=()=>setHov(false);const attach=()=>{document.querySelectorAll(selectors).forEach(el=>{el.addEventListener('mouseenter',on);el.addEventListener('mouseleave',off);});};attach();const mo=new MutationObserver(attach);mo.observe(document.body,{childList:true,subtree:true});return()=>{document.removeEventListener('mousemove',move);cancelAnimationFrame(raf);mo.disconnect();};},[]);return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs(_Fragment,{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{ref:dotRef,className:`cursor ${hov?'hov':''}`}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{ref:ringRef,className:`cursor-ring ${hov?'hov':''}`})]});}
